tasks.name: Initialize Next.js App Router Project
tasks.description: Set up a new Next.js project using the App Router architecture with TypeScript. Configure the project structure according to the best practices and project requirements.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Create a new Next.js project with the App Router using `npx create-next-app@latest` with TypeScript option
2. Set up the folder structure following Next.js App Router conventions with `/app` directory
3. Configure the root layout using the recommended structure from Next.js docs
4. Set up basic metadata for the application
5. Create environment variables and configuration files

tasks.name: Configure Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI
tasks.description: Set up Tailwind CSS and integrate Shadcn UI components. Establish a consistent design system by configuring theme variables, responsive layouts, and component styles.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Install Tailwind CSS dependencies
2. Configure `tailwind.config.js` to include all relevant paths including app directory
3. Set up global styles in `globals.css` with proper CSS variables for theming
4. Install and configure Shadcn UI using the CLI: `npx shadcn@latest init`
5. Add the `cn` utility function for component styling
6. Install and configure first core UI components (Button, Card, Input)

tasks.name: Set up Supabase Project and Database
tasks.description: Create a Supabase project, set up the database schema, authentication, storage, and security policies according to the project requirements.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Create a new Supabase project
2. Define the database schema for core tables (users, events, submissions, etc.)
3. Create necessary custom types and enums
4. Set up initial Row Level Security (RLS) policies
5. Configure storage buckets with appropriate permissions
6. Generate and save API keys and project URL for application integration

tasks.name: Integrate Supabase with Next.js
tasks.description: Set up the Supabase client in the Next.js application and configure authentication, database, and storage functionality.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Install Supabase JS client: `npm install @supabase/supabase-js`
2. Create a utility file for the Supabase client configuration
3. Set up environment variables for Supabase URL and API keys
4. Configure server-side and client-side Supabase instances
5. Create helper functions for common database operations
6. Implement auth state management hooks

tasks.name: Implement Internationalization with next-intl
tasks.description: Set up internationalization for the application using next-intl. Configure language detection, translation files, and routing for multiple languages.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Install next-intl: `npm install next-intl`
2. Create a middleware file using `createMiddleware` from next-intl
3. Set up locale detection and routing configuration
4. Create translation files for English, Arabic, and French
5. Configure the root layout with `NextIntlClientProvider`
6. Add `setRequestLocale` to enable static rendering
7. Create shared navigation functions using `createNavigation`

tasks.name: Set up Authentication System
tasks.description: Implement user authentication and authorization using Supabase Auth. Create sign-up, sign-in, and sign-out functionality with email verification.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Implement sign-up form with email and password using React Hook Form and Zod validation
2. Create sign-in form with error handling and validation
3. Implement email verification flow
4. Create auth state provider component to track authentication status
5. Implement sign-out functionality
6. Add password reset functionality
7. Set up protected routes and authentication middleware

tasks.name: Create User Profile Management
tasks.description: Build user profile pages and functionality allowing users to view and edit their profile information, preferences, and account settings.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Create user profile database schema with necessary fields
2. Implement profile page layout and components
3. Build edit profile form with validation
4. Create avatar/image upload functionality using Supabase storage
5. Implement profile data fetching and updating
6. Add user preference settings (notifications, language, etc.)
7. Implement account deletion functionality

tasks.name: Implement Role-Based Access Control
tasks.description: Create a role-based access control system to manage permissions for different user types (admin, organizer, attendee) throughout the application.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Define role and permission schemas in the database
2. Create admin interface for managing roles and permissions
3. Implement server-side authorization checks
4. Create client-side role-based UI rendering
5. Implement Row Level Security policies in Supabase for each role
6. Add role assignment and management functionality
7. Create custom hooks for role-based UI components

tasks.name: Develop Subscription Tier System
tasks.description: Implement subscription tier management with different feature access levels. Create subscription management pages and enforce subscription-based feature access.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Define subscription tier schema with feature availability flags
2. Create subscription management pages for users
3. Implement subscription tier enforcement using middleware
4. Build admin interface for managing subscription tiers
5. Create upgrade/downgrade flows
6. Implement feature access control based on subscription level
7. Add subscription expiration handling and notifications

tasks.name: Build Event Creation Interface
tasks.description: Create a comprehensive event creation interface allowing users to input event details, upload images, specify categories, and set event parameters.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design event data schema with all required fields
2. Create multi-step event creation form with validation
3. Implement image upload for event banners and galleries
4. Add rich text editor for event descriptions
5. Implement event category and tag selection
6. Create draft saving functionality
7. Add event preview before submission

tasks.name: Implement Event Management Dashboard
tasks.description: Create a dashboard for event organizers to manage their events, view statistics, and perform administrative actions. Implement filtering, sorting, and search functionality.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design the event management dashboard layout
2. Implement event listing with pagination, sorting, and filtering
3. Create event status management (publish, unpublish, delete)
4. Add event statistics display (views, submissions, etc.)
5. Implement event search functionality
6. Create event duplication functionality
7. Add bulk actions for event management

tasks.name: Build Event Detail Pages
tasks.description: Create detailed event pages displaying all event information, registration options, gallery, and related events. Implement SEO optimization and social sharing.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design and implement event detail page layout
2. Create dynamic metadata generation for SEO
3. Implement image gallery with lightbox functionality
4. Add registration/submission section
5. Create related events section
6. Implement social sharing buttons
7. Add internationalization for event content
8. Implement event bookmarking functionality

tasks.name: Create Submission Forms System
tasks.description: Build a dynamic form system for event submissions. Include form validation, file uploads, and multi-step submission processes.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design submission form data schema
2. Implement multi-step form interface with validation
3. Create file upload components for documents and media
4. Add form state management and persistence
5. Implement form submission and confirmation
6. Create draft saving functionality
7. Add submission editing for users
8. Implement form field conditional logic

tasks.name: Develop Submission Management
tasks.description: Create interfaces for users and administrators to manage, review, and track submissions. Implement status updates and communication features.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design submission management dashboard
2. Create submission listing with filtering and sorting
3. Implement submission detail view
4. Add status update functionality
5. Create admin review interface
6. Implement notification system for status changes
7. Add commenting and feedback functionality
8. Create submission export features

tasks.name: Implement Document Verification System
tasks.description: Build a system for document verification requests, uploads, and admin review processes. Implement secure document storage and access controls.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design document verification workflow
2. Create verification request forms
3. Implement document upload with type validation
4. Build admin verification interface
5. Create document approval/rejection flows
6. Implement secure document storage with access controls
7. Add verification status tracking
8. Create notification system for status updates

tasks.name: Set up Language Translation Files
tasks.description: Create translation files for all supported languages (English, Arabic, French). Implement a structured approach to translations with namespaces for different sections of the application.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Create a structured folder for translations (`/i18n/locales/`)
2. Set up translation files for English (base language)
3. Create corresponding translation files for Arabic with proper RTL support
4. Add translation files for French
5. Organize translations into logical namespaces (common, auth, events, etc.)
6. Implement pluralization and formatting for dates, numbers, and currencies
7. Create helper functions for common translation patterns

tasks.name: Implement Language Switching UI
tasks.description: Create UI components for language switching and ensure proper locale persistence. Implement language detection and preference saving.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Create a language switcher component
2. Implement locale change functionality using next-intl
3. Add locale persistence in cookies or local storage
4. Implement auto-detection of user's preferred language
5. Create language preference settings in user profile
6. Add appropriate language indicators in UI
7. Implement proper URL handling for language switching

tasks.name: Implement RTL Layout Support
tasks.description: Add Right-to-Left (RTL) layout support for Arabic language. Ensure proper text alignment, directional UI elements, and consistent styling.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Configure Tailwind CSS for RTL support
2. Create RTL versions of layout components
3. Implement directional CSS variables and utilities
4. Add RTL-specific component variants
5. Set up proper text alignment and bidirectional text support
6. Test and fix layout issues in RTL mode
7. Ensure proper form and input element behavior in RTL mode

tasks.name: Build Offline Payment Tracking System
tasks.description: Implement a system for tracking and managing offline payments. Create payment reference generation, payment status tracking, and verification workflows.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design payment tracking database schema
2. Create payment reference code generation system
3. Implement payment instruction page with localization
4. Build payment status tracking interface
5. Create payment verification workflow for administrators
6. Implement email notifications for payment status updates
7. Add payment history and receipts functionality

tasks.name: Create Admin Dashboard
tasks.description: Build a comprehensive admin dashboard with user management, content moderation, system statistics, and administrative functions.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design admin dashboard layout and navigation
2. Implement user management section (list, edit, delete users)
3. Create event moderation section with approval workflows
4. Add submission review and management section
5. Implement system statistics and analytics displays
6. Create settings and configuration section
7. Add audit logs and activity tracking

tasks.name: Design Research Repository Schema
tasks.description: Design the database schema and architecture for the research repository. Define paper metadata, categorization, access controls, and relationships.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Define the requirements for the research repository
2. Design database schema for research papers and metadata
3. Create taxonomy and categorization system
4. Define relationships between papers, authors, events, etc.
5. Set up access control rules for different user types
6. Create versioning system for paper updates
7. Plan search indexing strategy

tasks.name: Implement Research Paper Submission
tasks.description: Create the interface and backend functionality for users to submit research papers. Implement metadata entry, file uploads, and review process.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design research paper submission form
2. Implement file upload for papers (PDF, DOCX)
3. Create metadata entry form (title, authors, abstract, keywords, etc.)
4. Add validation for required fields and file types
5. Implement draft saving functionality
6. Create submission confirmation and tracking
7. Add review queue for administrators

tasks.name: Build Research Repository Frontend
tasks.description: Create the user interface for browsing, searching, and viewing research papers. Implement filtering, sorting, and paper detail views.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design repository main page with featured papers
2. Implement paper listing with filtering and sorting
3. Create paper detail page with metadata and download options
4. Add author and category browsing interfaces
5. Implement paper statistics (views, downloads)
6. Create user library for saved papers
7. Add social sharing functionality

tasks.name: Implement Advanced Search Functionality
tasks.description: Create an advanced search system for the entire application with filters, saved searches, and relevant results ranking.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design search data model and indexing strategy
2. Implement basic search functionality with text matching
3. Create advanced search interface with multiple filters
4. Add search result ranking algorithm
5. Implement saved searches functionality
6. Create search analytics tracking
7. Add search suggestion and autocomplete features

tasks.name: Create Testing Framework and Write Tests
tasks.description: Set up a comprehensive testing framework and write tests for critical application functionality. Include unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Set up testing framework (Jest, React Testing Library)
2. Create test utilities and helpers
3. Implement unit tests for critical functions
4. Add integration tests for key workflows
5. Create end-to-end tests for main user journeys
6. Implement API testing
7. Set up test coverage reporting
8. Create testing documentation

tasks.name: Configure CI/CD Pipeline
tasks.description: Set up continuous integration and continuous deployment pipelines for automatic testing, building, and deployment of the application.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Configure GitHub Actions or another CI/CD service
2. Set up linting and formatting checks
3. Configure test running in CI
4. Set up build process for production
5. Implement automatic deployment to Vercel
6. Configure branch protection rules
7. Set up environment-specific deployments
8. Create deployment notifications

tasks.name: Implement Analytics and Monitoring
tasks.description: Set up analytics for tracking user behavior and monitoring for application performance and errors. Create dashboards for monitoring key metrics.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design analytics tracking strategy
2. Implement privacy-focused event tracking
3. Set up error monitoring and reporting
4. Create custom analytics dashboard
5. Implement performance monitoring
6. Add user flow tracking
7. Set up alerting for critical issues
8. Create reporting functionality for key metrics

tasks.name: Build Recommendation System
tasks.description: Create a recommendation system for events, papers, and other content based on user interests, behavior, and similarities.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design recommendation algorithm and strategy
2. Implement user interest tracking
3. Create content similarity analysis
4. Build recommendation display components
5. Implement personalized home page
6. Add email recommendations
7. Create recommendation feedback loop
8. Set up A/B testing for recommendation effectiveness

tasks.name: Create User Documentation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive user documentation, tutorials, and help center for the application. Include guides for different user roles and features.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Design documentation structure and organization
2. Create getting started guides for each user role
3. Implement feature-specific documentation
4. Add tutorial videos and walkthroughs
5. Create FAQ section
6. Implement help search functionality
7. Add contextual help throughout the application
8. Create documentation for API and integrations

tasks.name: Optimize Performance and Accessibility
tasks.description: Audit and optimize the application for performance, accessibility, and SEO. Implement improvements to ensure fast loading, accessibility compliance, and good search engine visibility.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Perform performance audit and optimization
2. Run accessibility audit and implement fixes
3. Optimize image loading and processing
4. Implement code splitting and lazy loading
5. Add proper focus management and keyboard navigation
6. Ensure proper ARIA attributes and screen reader support
7. Optimize meta tags and structured data for SEO
8. Implement performance monitoring and improvement process
